official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound entity_position_sync packet fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official entity_position_sync body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state
Write and dispatch-decode the full official Play clientbound entity_position_sync frame

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns entity_position_sync to packet id 0x23.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the entity_position_sync id to ClientboundEntityPositionSyncPacket.
The official entity_position_sync body is entity id VarInt, PositionMoveRotation, and onGround boolean.
The fixture uses primitive constructor values, so it does not require initialized Entity, Level, registry contents, or game state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded fields, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove initialized Entity/Level behavior, entity existence, spawn readiness, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer initialized Entity/Level behavior, entity existence, spawn readiness, render readiness, or client-load completion.
